effect.content: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

governance.preferred_form: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

rule_text: Administration messaging must use the approved verbatim statement: "LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required."
intent: Keep administration/route claims within approved language.
summary: Administration messaging must include approved verbatim: "LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, no shots or infusions required.
